title: Log in and land in the correct area
description: Verifies that a valid user can log in successfully and is routed to the correct role-specific area after authentication.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for the required role
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands in the correct role area

title: Sign in and reach the correct workspace
description: This verifies that a user can sign in with valid credentials and land in the appropriate authenticated area.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the correct dashboard area

title: Register a new patient account
description: This verifies that a new patient can complete registration and is taken to email verification afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the personal details form with valid patient information
Fill in the contact details form with valid patient information
Submit the registration form
Verify a registration success message is visible
Verify the email verification page is shown

title: Verify a newly registered patient account
description: Verifies that a newly registered patient can complete email verification with the provided token and see a successful verification outcome.

steps.description: Navigate to /verify-email
Fill in the verification token provided for the new account
Submit the verification form
Verify a successful verification confirmation is visible

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: This verifies that signing in with invalid credentials shows an error and does not enter the app.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Submit the login form
Verify a login error message is visible
Verify the authenticated area is not shown

title: Set a new password with a reset token
description: Verifies that a user can complete the password reset flow with a valid token and see a successful password update confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /reset-password
Fill in the reset token provided for the account
Fill in the new password fields with a valid new password
Submit the password reset form
Verify a successful password update confirmation is visible

title: Verify a patient account with a valid token
description: This verifies that a patient can complete email verification with a valid token and see a successful result.

steps.description: Navigate to /verify-email
Enter a valid verification token
Submit the verification form
Verify a verification success message is visible

title: Request a password reset link
description: This verifies that a user can request a password reset and receive a confirmation state.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Submit the reset request form
Verify a password reset confirmation message is visible

title: Create an appointment as an administrator
description: Verifies that an administrator can create a new appointment by selecting a professional, a patient, and a date and time, and that the new appointment appears in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for an administrator
Submit the login form
Click the appointments management area
Create a new appointment
Select a professional for the appointment
Select a patient for the appointment
Select a valid date and time for the appointment
Save the appointment
Verify the new appointment appears in the appointment list

title: Admin views dashboard statistics
description: Verifies that an administrator can open the dashboard and see the system statistics needed to monitor appointments and patients.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the dashboard
Verify appointment statistics are displayed
Verify patient statistics are displayed

title: Delete an appointment as an administrator
description: Verifies that an administrator can remove an appointment from the system and that it no longer appears in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for an administrator
Submit the login form
Click the appointments management area
Select an existing appointment
Delete the appointment
Verify the appointment is no longer shown in the list

title: Update professional profile details
description: A professional can edit their profile information and save the changes successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a professional user
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the profile page
Edit the name, specialty, and CRM details with valid values
Save the profile changes
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the updated profile information is displayed

title: Reschedule an appointment with justification
description: Verifies that a patient can reschedule one of their appointments by selecting a new date and time and providing a justification, and that the updated appointment appears.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a patient
Submit the login form
Click the my appointments area
Select an upcoming appointment
Choose the reschedule appointment action
Select a valid new date and time
Fill in a rescheduling justification
Confirm the reschedule
Verify the appointment shows the updated schedule

title: Administrator creates a professional account
description: Verifies that an administrator can add a new professional and see it appear in the professionals list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open professional management
Start creating a new professional
Fill in the professional name with a unique value
Fill in the professional email with a unique value
Fill in the remaining required professional details
Submit the professional form
Verify the new professional appears in the list
Verify the professionals list remains available

title: Cancel an appointment with justification
description: Verifies that a patient can cancel one of their appointments by providing a justification and that the appointment is updated accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a patient
Submit the login form
Click the my appointments area
Select an upcoming appointment
Choose the cancel appointment action
Fill in a cancellation justification
Confirm the cancellation
Verify the appointment is shown as cancelled

title: Save a clinical note for an appointment
description: A professional can open an appointment record, enter clinical notes, and save the medical record successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a professional user
Submit the login form
Open a medical record for an appointment from the professional appointments page
Enter clinical notes in the record form
Save the medical record
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the saved medical record content is displayed

title: Save monthly availability changes
description: A professional can save edited availability and see a success confirmation after the changes are applied.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to monthly availability
Toggle at least one time slot on the calendar grid
Save the monthly availability
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the updated availability remains displayed

title: Administrator unblocks a patient account
description: Verifies that an administrator can unblock a blocked patient and see the account available again in the patients list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open patient management
Select a blocked patient account to unblock
Confirm the unblock action
Verify the patient is shown as unblocked
Verify the patient remains in the list

title: Confirm a scheduled appointment as a professional
description: Verifies that a professional can confirm one of today's appointments and that the appointment status is updated in the schedule view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a professional
Submit the login form
Click the professional appointments area
View today's appointments
Select an appointment
Confirm the appointment
Verify the appointment is marked as confirmed

title: Export the dashboard data set
description: An administrator can export the dashboard data as a CSV file from the dashboard page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for an administrator user
Submit the login form
Navigate to /panel/dashboard
Export the dashboard data set
Verify a CSV export is initiated
Verify the export action completes successfully

title: Mark availability for a time slot
description: A professional can toggle a slot on the monthly calendar and see it marked as available.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to monthly availability
Toggle an available time slot on the calendar grid
Verify the chosen time slot is marked as available

title: Administrator edits a professional account
description: Verifies that an administrator can update an existing professional and see the saved changes reflected in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open professional management
Select an existing professional for editing
Update the professional details with new valid values
Submit the professional update form
Verify the updated professional information is visible in the list

title: Mark a patient as absent as a professional
description: Verifies that a professional can mark an appointment as absent from the all-appointments view and that the absence status is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a professional
Submit the login form
Click the professional appointments area
View all appointments
Select an appointment
Mark the patient as absent
Verify the appointment is marked as absent

title: Export personal appointment data
description: A patient can export their own appointment data as a CSV file from the appointments page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a patient user
Submit the login form
Navigate to /panel/my-appointments
Export the personal appointment data set
Verify a CSV export is initiated
Verify the export action completes successfully

title: Upload a patient document
description: A professional can upload a new document and see it added to the document list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to document management
Upload a new document for a patient
Verify the uploaded document appears in the list

title: Export the professionals list
description: An administrator can export the professionals data as a CSV file from the professionals page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for an administrator user
Submit the login form
Navigate to /panel/professionals
Export the professionals data set
Verify a CSV export is initiated
Verify the export action completes successfully

title: Administrator removes a professional account
description: Verifies that an administrator can delete a professional account and no longer see it in the list afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open professional management
Select an existing professional for deletion

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to my documents
Download an exam document from the list

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for an administrator user
Submit the login form
Navigate to /panel/patients
Export the patients data set

Verify the export action completes successfully

title: Administrator removes a patient account
description: Verifies that an administrator can delete a patient account and the patient is removed from the patients list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login

Submit the login form

title: Keep the document list usable after an upload
description: A professional can upload a document and continue to see a usable updated list with the new item present.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to document management
Upload a new document for a patient
Wait for the list to refresh

title: View the monthly availability grid
description: A professional can open monthly availability and see the scheduling grid for the selected month.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}

steps.description: Navigate to /verify-email
Submit the verification form without a valid token
Verify a verification error message is visible

title: Reject invalid profile edits
description: A professional is shown validation feedback when required profile fields are left invalid and the changes are not saved.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a professional user
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the profile page
Clear or enter invalid values in a required profile field
Save the profile changes
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the profile details remain unchanged

title: Show validation when the reset token is missing or invalid
description: This verifies that the reset password page shows an error state when the token is not usable.

steps.description: Navigate to /reset-password
Submit the reset form without a valid token
Verify a reset password error message is visible

title: Keep medical record notes required
description: A professional cannot save a medical record until the required clinical notes are provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a professional user
Submit the login form
Open a medical record for an appointment from the professional appointments page
Leave the clinical notes field empty
Save the medical record
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the record is not saved

title: Show an empty state when no documents exist
description: A patient with no uploaded exam documents sees an empty state instead of a broken document list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to my documents
Verify an empty state message is visible
